titleEn: The art(s) of laser weeding demystified: laser expert Matthias Lautenschläger explains
titleZh: 激光除草技术揭秘：专家Matthias Lautenschläger详解
summaryZh: 本文由激光专家Matthias Lautenschläger撰写，深入解析激光除草技术的原理、现状与前景。文章指出，激光虽已广泛应用于金属切割、测距、土地平整和视力矫正等领域，但在除草方面仍被视为“黑箱”，充满神秘与炒作。作者旨在帮助农民、种植者和承包商客观评估这项技术，揭示其真实潜力与局限。
featuredReason: 激光除草作为精准农业的前沿技术，对智慧畜牧行业中的种植业环节（如饲料作物管理）具有潜在应用价值，本文提供了客观的技术解析，有助于行业人士理性评估其可行性。
contentFull: The art(s) of laser weeding demystified: laser expert Matthias Lautenschläger explains 08-06 | Smart farming | ArticleLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintLaser expert Matthias Lautenschläger. Photo: Matthias LautenschlägerLaser weeding is currently an extremely hot topic with farmers, growers and contractors across the world. Literally as well, as the temperatures add up significantly.Laser beams are already part of everyday life such as cutting metal sheets, measuring distances, levelling land and correcting eye vision. We trust the technology without thinking twice. Yet when it comes to laser weeding, it still feels like a black box: mystical, (over) hyped and difficult to evaluate objectively. translationZh:
激光除草目前是全球农民、种植者和承包商的热门话题。从字面上看也是如此，因为温度会显著升高。

激光束已经成为日常生活的一部分，例如切割金属板、测量距离、平整土地和矫正视力。我们毫不犹豫地信任这项技术。然而，当谈到激光除草时，它仍然像一个黑匣子：神秘、被（过度）炒作，且难以客观评估。
author: René Koerhuis
contentHtml: Laser weeding is currently an extremely hot topic with farmers, growers and contractors across the world. Literally as well, as the temperatures add up significantly.
